benefits.description: Lost 75 pounds since September (approximately 5 months), confirmed as all fat with no muscle loss via body scans
Reduced cravings through medication and dietary adjustments
Addressing sagging skin through collagen intake and adequate protein

protocol_notes: Started September 2023 (approximately 5 months prior to comment). Consuming 200g protein daily. Walking 10,000+ steps per day. Sleeping 7+ hours nightly. Detailed dietary approach: vegetables first, then protein, then carbs. Consuming good fats, taco salads, full-calorie chicken soup, nuts. Eliminated simple sugars. Body scans confirmed all fat loss with no muscle loss.
